description:
After pushing through the trials, "Aussa", "Eria", "Hiita", and "Wynn" reach a mysterious chamber hidden deep within the ruins.
With Aussa`s recovery potions ready, the four attempt the "Grand Spiritual Art - Ichirin" once more.
The bond they’ve forged through overcoming the challenges together begins to bloom into a single flower.
But the surge of spiritual power grows ever more intensely, testing their resolve, while the familiars also muster their strength.
Will their wishes be answered...?
Source: Official English Website

titles.title: Seireijutsu no Tsukaite IV "Chirei Tsukai Aussa"
Spirit Charmers IV: "Aussa the Earth Charmer"
精霊術の使い手IV「地霊使いアウス」
